channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI skills 2026: the 5 that move your paycheck
item.description: Fine-tuning LoRA vs vector search in 2026: salaries jump 19% for engineers who master both. Benchmarks, cost deltas, and the exact infra mistakes that cost $4k+/month.

item.title: Stream vs Socket vs Poll: Which Fits
item.description: Pick WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling for real-time apps — measured latency, max users, and AWS cost per 1 M messages on Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2 in 2026.

item.title: Ace remote interviews without LeetCode
item.description: When I was interviewing in 2025, I ran into this exact trap — I memorized every binary search variant and could recite CAP theorem definitions, but I…

item.title: Show your stack, not your stars
item.description: Land remote jobs from Africa with systems that actually work — deploy, load test, and document real metrics instead of chasing GitHub stars. 2026 hiring data included.

item.title: RAG pipelines: 5 prod lessons
item.description: Cut RAG latency 80% and AWS bill 72% by moving off Chroma to pgvector on Aurora, adding hybrid search, and caching aggressively — the operational details tutorials skip.

item.title: Big Tech exodus: what breaks first after year five
item.description: Cut attrition 41% after year five by fixing guardrails, thresholds, and runbooks — not salary. 2026 numbers, real exit interviews, and the playbook senior engineers wish they had found.

item.title: AI salaries hinge on 3 skills in 2026
item.description: Cut AI salary gap 2026: prompt engineering vs fine-tuning ROI with 78% cost data and latency benchmarks. Which skill pays and why.

item.title: WebSockets vs SSE vs long-polling: which fits your app?
item.description: Choose between WebSockets, Server-Sent Events and long-polling in 2026 with concrete benchmarks and Redis 7.2 tuning — cut latency and cost by picking the right push tech first time.

item.title: Turn local pay into remote dollars
item.description: Negotiate remote pay 28% higher with 3 email templates. 2026 USD quotes, local cost worksheets, and FX fee breakdowns that close deals faster.

item.title: Miscount your DB pool? Expect slow queries
item.description: Cut API response time 60% by fixing one connection pool mistake — most teams still use 2010-era rules. Includes the formula, benchmarks, and AWS cost impact from 2026 systems.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay without leaving home
item.description: Land $120k remote jobs from $5k markets — staging stack, latency proof, and salary negotiation scripts that turn geographic arbitrage into real paychecks.

item.title: Stop tuning max pool size
item.description: Set max pool size wrong and waste 40 % cloud spend — connection wait times jump 2× while databases sit idle. 2026 numbers and fixes for Node, Python, Go.

item.title: Show Africa not certs to land remote jobs
item.description: A production scar is any incident you’ve lived through and documented: a database melt-up at 03:17, a payment retry storm that cost $1,800 in duplicate…

item.title: Compare real-time: WebSockets, SSE, long polling
item.description: Choose WebSocket, SSE, or long polling in 2026 with hard latency, memory, and cost numbers from real load tests on Node 20 LTS, FastAPI 0.111, and Redis 7.2.

item.title: AI salary boosters: skills that paid in 2026
item.description: In 2026 only two AI skills pay reliably: prompt engineering for production systems and vector-database tuning. See the exact salary deltas, benchmarks, and tool stacks that move the needle.

item.title: Senior devs quit big tech—here’s why
item.description: Cut local iteration time from minutes to seconds — the hidden reasons senior engineers leave big tech and how to fix them with concrete metrics and code.

item.title: M-Pesa vs Paystack vs Flutterwave: which API bites?
item.description: Cut failed African payment integrations 70% with the right API choice — M-Pesa, Paystack, or Flutterwave benchmarks, fees, and hidden gotchas in 2026.

item.title: AI skills paying 40% more in 2026
item.description: AI skills paying 40% more in 2026: the data-backed breakdown of prompt engineering vs. AI engineering roles and what actually moves salary

item.title: Senior exits: Why FAANG burns out
item.description: Measure on-call load in 50 lines of Python — turn burnout into a metric you can negotiate with. 2026 attrition data from Glassdoor and Blind.

item.title: RAG pipelines: 3 things tutorials never tell you
item.description: The tutorials we read all promised 5-minute setups and latency under 500 ms at 95th percentile.
